start.welcome_back: Welcome back! Click on menu button to continue.
start.info:
Via this bot you can purchase telegram stars and telegram premium without KYC verification and cheaper than in the telegram app.

Please, click menu button below to start using our bot and make your first purchase!

menu.description:
Vozik Shop 🛒 The cheapest Stars and Telegram Premium — no verification required, available to everyone.
We accept payments in $TON, $USDT, $USDC, $BTC, $ETH, $BNB, $TRX, $POL, $SOL, $LTC and more.
Please, choose an action:👇🏻
menu.gift_promo:
🎁 Gifts for everyone! 🎁 The bot now automatically sends you a gift for active referrals!
✅ Get a GIFT 🎁 for your first 3 active referrals — those who made at least one purchase ✅ After that — 1 gift for every next 5 active referrals 🎁!
🔹 You can exchange the gift for stars or keep it in your profile. 💡 Invite friends using your referral link and receive gifts while they buy stars at the best price on the market ⭐ 🎁 Boost your referral link - and get even more rewards! 🎁

buy_stars.stars_amount: Enter amount of stars ⭐️ you want to buy (min 50):
buy_stars.username: 👨‍💻 Choose who do you want to buy stars for:
buy_stars.enter_username:
👨‍💻 Enter account @username you want to buy stars for:

❗️Make sure such account exists❗️
buy_stars.invalid_username: Incorrect username. Enter correct username. It MUST start with @.
buy_stars.invalid_amount: Incorrect amount. Enter correct amount of stars (min 50).

order_ton.memo: ❗️❗️Make sure to add this number in the comment (memo) to the transaction:
order_ton.info:
‼️ Send the exact amount to the address above ‼️
(monitor and take into account the transfer fee, which is deducted from the balance or from the amount sent)
⚠️ Without the comment your order WILL NOT BE PROCESSED ⚠️
In case of any issues - contact our support.
❗️Also you can pay in one click via Tonkeeper👇🏻

order_usd.info:
💸 Payment via crypto (USDT and other cryptocurrencies).
Press the button below to get to the payment page.

buy_stars.confirm_payment:
Your transaction is being processed. Please, wait.

You will receive a notification when we will process your order. For now, you can go back to the menu.
buy_stars.referral_2: TON because your referral just made a purchase!
buy_stars.error_1: ⚠️ Your payment was successful, but purchase failed. Contact support.
buy_stars.error_2: ⚠️ Error while processing your payment. Contact support.
buy_stars.error_3: ❌ We were unable to create payment link. Please try again later.
